findings.summary: Simple heated bed PCB with single heater element between +24V and GND. Analyzer output is accurate for this minimal design.

correct.description: Heater (Device:Heater with R prefix) correctly classified as resistor type
4 mounting holes correctly identified and excluded from BOM
Power rails +24V and GND correctly detected
PWR_FLAG warnings correctly issued for both power rails

suggestions: Could note that lib_id Device:Heater indicates a heating element rather than a standard resistor, though resistor classification is technically correct
